title: Upper Yard, the Forbidden Land — Part 5
description: The crew enters the dangerous forest of Upper Yard, where priests, beasts, and God’s judgment threaten every path.
scene: Across pages 17, 18, 19, this scene centers on Gan Fall, Shandia warrior, Wyper, Luffy, Nami. The crew enters the dangerous forest of Upper Yard, where priests, beasts, and God’s judgment threaten every path.

dialogue.speaker: Gan Fall
dialogue.text: But we have Nakama* on God's island!!!

summary: The crew enters the dangerous forest of Upper Yard, where priests, beasts, and God’s judgment threaten every path.
